---
title: "Face familiarity and image-specific memory"
authors: "Kramer, R., Berry, C., Jones, A. L., & Gous, G."
year: 2020
date: 2020-01-01
pub-journal: "Perception"
volume: "49(9)"
doi: "10.1177/0301006620946265"
pdf: "assets/papers/2020/Kramer, Berry, Jones, & Gous 2020.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
